title: Class Hierarchy (Full)
name: Class Hierarchy (Full)
description: All current ontology classes with their subclass_of relationships.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parents = (
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN { parent: v.label, parent_key: v._key }
  )
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    parents: parents
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parents = (
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN { parent: v.label, parent_key: v._key }
  )
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    parents: parents
  }

title: Top-Level Classes
name: Top-Level Classes
description: Root classes with no parent (no outgoing subclass_of edges).
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parent_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER parent_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    description: cls.description
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parent_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER parent_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    description: cls.description
  }

title: Orphan Classes
name: Orphan Classes
description: Classes with no edges — no subclass_of, has_property, or related_to.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET edge_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY cls subclass_of, has_property, related_to
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      LIMIT 1
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER edge_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    confidence: cls.confidence
  }
value:

  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807

      RETURN 1

  FILTER edge_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    confidence: cls.confidence
  }

title: Low Confidence Entities
name: Low Confidence Entities
description: Classes and properties with confidence below 0.5.
content:
LET low_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.confidence != null AND cls.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, confidence: cls.confidence, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET low_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.confidence != null AND prop.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, confidence: prop.confidence, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(low_classes, low_props)
  SORT entity.confidence ASC
  RETURN entity

title: Recently Created
name: Recently Created
description: Entities created in the last 24 hours.
content:
LET cutoff = DATE_SUBTRACT(DATE_NOW(), 1, 'day')
LET cutoff_ts = DATE_TIMESTAMP(cutoff) / 1000
LET recent_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807 AND cls.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, created: cls.created, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET recent_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807 AND prop.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, created: prop.created, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(recent_classes, recent_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity
value:
LET cutoff = DATE_SUBTRACT(DATE_NOW(), 1, 'day')
LET cutoff_ts = DATE_TIMESTAMP(cutoff) / 1000
LET recent_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807 AND cls.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, created: cls.created, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET recent_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807 AND prop.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, created: prop.created, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(recent_classes, recent_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity

title: Properties by Domain Class
name: Properties by Domain Class
description: Properties grouped by their domain class via has_property edges.
content:
FOR e IN has_property
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET prop = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  FILTER domain_cls != null AND prop != null
  COLLECT domain_label = domain_cls.label INTO props
  RETURN {
    domain_class: domain_label,
    properties: props[*].prop.label,
    property_count: LENGTH(props)
  }
value:
FOR e IN has_property
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET prop = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  FILTER domain_cls != null AND prop != null
  COLLECT domain_label = domain_cls.label INTO props
  RETURN {
    domain_class: domain_label,
    properties: props[*].prop.label,
    property_count: LENGTH(props)
  }

title: Ontology Statistics
name: Ontology Statistics
description: Summary: classes, properties, and edges per ontology.

title: Classes by Ontology ID
name: Classes by Ontology ID
description: All current classes for a specific ontology.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  SORT cls.label ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    confidence: cls.confidence,
    rdf_type: cls.rdf_type,
    description: cls.description
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  SORT cls.label ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    confidence: cls.confidence,
    rdf_type: cls.rdf_type,
    description: cls.description
  }

title: Pending Curation
name: Pending Curation
description: Entities with status 'pending' awaiting human review.

title: Ontology at Point in Time
name: Ontology at Point in Time
description: Fetch the ontology as it existed at a specific Unix timestamp. Set @ontology_id to scope to one ontology (leave empty for all). Set @snapshot_time to 0 for current time, or a past Unix timestamp to travel back. Uses MDI-prefixed index on [ontology_id, created, expired] for fast lookups.
content:
LET t = @snapshot_time == 0 ? DATE_NOW()/1000 : @snapshot_time

LET classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.created <= t
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR cls.expired > t
    RETURN {
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      uri: cls.uri,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      confidence: cls.confidence,
      rdf_type: cls.rdf_type,
      description: cls.description,
      created: cls.created,
      created_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET properties = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR prop.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER prop.created <= t
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR prop.expired > t
    RETURN {
      _key: prop._key,
      label: prop.label,
      ontology_id: prop.ontology_id,
      domain_class: prop.domain_class,
      range: prop.range,
      created: prop.created,
      created_human: DATE_ISO8601(prop.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET edges = (
  FOR e IN UNION(
    (FOR e IN subclass_of FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'subclass_of'})),
    (FOR e IN has_property FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'has_property'})),
    (FOR e IN related_to FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'related_to'}))
  )
  RETURN e
)

RETURN {
  snapshot_time: t,
  snapshot_human: DATE_ISO8601(t * 1000),
  ontology_id: @ontology_id,
  class_count: LENGTH(classes),
  property_count: LENGTH(properties),
  edge_count: LENGTH(edges),
  classes: classes,
  properties: properties,
  edges: edges
}
value:
LET t = @snapshot_time == 0 ? DATE_NOW()/1000 : @snapshot_time

LET classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.created <= t
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR cls.expired > t
    RETURN {
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      uri: cls.uri,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      confidence: cls.confidence,
      rdf_type: cls.rdf_type,
      description: cls.description,
      created: cls.created,
      created_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET properties = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR prop.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER prop.created <= t
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR prop.expired > t
    RETURN {
      _key: prop._key,
      label: prop.label,
      ontology_id: prop.ontology_id,
      domain_class: prop.domain_class,
      range: prop.range,
      created: prop.created,
      created_human: DATE_ISO8601(prop.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET edges = (
  FOR e IN UNION(
    (FOR e IN subclass_of FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'subclass_of'})),
    (FOR e IN has_property FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'has_property'})),
    (FOR e IN related_to FILTER (@ontology_id == '' OR e.ontology_id == @ontology_id) AND e.created <= t AND (e.expired == 9223372036854775807 OR e.expired > t) RETURN MERGE(e, {edge_type: 'related_to'}))
  )
  RETURN e
)

RETURN {
  snapshot_time: t,
  snapshot_human: DATE_ISO8601(t * 1000),
  ontology_id: @ontology_id,
  class_count: LENGTH(classes),
  property_count: LENGTH(properties),
  edge_count: LENGTH(edges),
  classes: classes,
  properties: properties,
  edges: edges
}

title: Ontology Changes Since
name: Ontology Changes Since
description: Show all classes and properties that were created or expired since a given Unix timestamp. Set @ontology_id to scope to one ontology (leave empty for all). Uses MDI-prefixed index on [ontology_id, created, expired].
content:
LET since = @since_time

LET created_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.created >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'CREATED',
      type: 'class',
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      timestamp: cls.created,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET expired_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.expired != 9223372036854775807 AND cls.expired >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'EXPIRED',
      type: 'class',
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      timestamp: cls.expired,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.expired * 1000)
    }
)

LET created_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR prop.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER prop.created >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'CREATED',
      type: 'property',
      _key: prop._key,
      label: prop.label,
      ontology_id: prop.ontology_id,
      timestamp: prop.created,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(prop.created * 1000)
    }
)

FOR event IN UNION(created_classes, expired_classes, created_props)
  SORT event.timestamp DESC
  RETURN event
value:
LET since = @since_time

LET created_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.created >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'CREATED',
      type: 'class',
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      timestamp: cls.created,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.created * 1000)
    }
)

LET expired_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR cls.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER cls.expired != 9223372036854775807 AND cls.expired >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'EXPIRED',
      type: 'class',
      _key: cls._key,
      label: cls.label,
      ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
      timestamp: cls.expired,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(cls.expired * 1000)
    }
)

LET created_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER @ontology_id == '' OR prop.ontology_id == @ontology_id
    FILTER prop.created >= since
    RETURN {
      change: 'CREATED',
      type: 'property',
      _key: prop._key,
      label: prop.label,
      ontology_id: prop.ontology_id,
      timestamp: prop.created,
      timestamp_human: DATE_ISO8601(prop.created * 1000)
    }
)

FOR event IN UNION(created_classes, expired_classes, created_props)
  SORT event.timestamp DESC
  RETURN event
